body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-9098", "cvss": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-488", "name": "Exposure of Data Element to Wrong Session"}], "description": "In Casdoor versions 2.362.0 and earlier, the SAML callback handler in controllers/auth.go accepts any well-formed SAMLResponse sent to /api/acs without verifying that it corresponds to an AuthnRequest previously issued by Casdoor. Additionally, if an administrator disables or deletes an IdP (Identity Provider) after a SAML flow has started, the handler still processes the response using the provider snapshot loaded at the start of the request. As a result, an attacker controlling a registered upstream IdP can send unsolicited SAML responses, or replay a legitimately captured response in a different session or after the original flow has ended. In both cases, Casdoor accepts the response and issues a session, enabling persistent unauthorized access.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0023, "percentile": 0.13622}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mfvp-7p3v-x9mh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T18:37:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mfvp-7p3v-x9mh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mfvp-7p3v-x9mh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9098"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T17:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T18:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9098", "https://kb.cert.org/vuls/id/780781", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mfvp-7p3v-x9mh"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor", "summary": "Casdoor SAML callback handler accepts any well-formed SAMLResponse sent to /api/acs without verifying that it corresponds to an AuthnRequest", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T18:38:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mfvp-7p3v-x9mh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/casdoor/casdoor"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.1000.1-0.20260321120606-239e8bd69487"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Casdoor SAML callback handler accepts any well-formed SAMLResponse sent to /api/acs without verifying that it corresponds to an AuthnRequest
